rulings.Case Title: SPYRIDON JOHN STROUZAS et al VS. DAVID CHOO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Andm Motion For Order Compelling Defts California Mortgage And Realty, Inc. To Attend, Testify And Produce Documents At Deposition, Provide Respponses To Form Interrogatories And Respond And Produce Docuiments To Document Demand And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Friday, September 3, 2010, line 4. PLAINTIFFS SPYRIDON STROUZAS, IRENE STROUZAS, BESTIE STROUZAS, BARBARA STROUZAS, CLAREMONT TOWERS APARTMENTS, L.P., PENELOPE TAMM, MENDOCINO MANOR, LTD., L.P., GEORGE CHILIANIS and MARIA CHILIANIS' Motion For Order Compelling Defendants California Mortgage And Realty, Inc. To Attend, Testify And Produce Documents At Deposition, Provide Responses To Form Interrogatories And Respond And Produce Docuiments To Document Demand And Imposing Monetary Sanctions is off calendar. Action stayed pursuant to C.C.P. Section 1281.4. The court notes that it granted the petition to compel arbitration on 8/27/10 as unopposed. The court vacates the 8/27/10 ruling because it appears that the parties intended for the motion to compel arbitration to be heard on 9/10/10. = (302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH BANDIERA VS. DUNCAN EASTWOOD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 3, 2010, line 3, CROSS-DEFENDANT JOSEPH BANDIERA MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. DENIED, 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. THE TIME TO AMEND RUNS FROM THE DATE OF THE ENTRY OF THE ORDER, NOT THE HEARING. THE PLEADING IS SUFFICIENT ON ITS FACE. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ESTRADA VS. DENNIS GOZA et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 3, 2010, line 5, DEFENDANT DENNIS GOZA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - DUPLICATE ENTRY. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ESTRADA VS. DENNIS GOZA et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 3, 2010, line 5, DEFENDANT DENNIS GOZA'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE FIREFIGHTER'S RULE BARS PLAINTIFF'S RECOVERY. THE CONDUCT CAUSING THE INJURY WAS THE FIRE. PLAINTIFF WAS INJURED WHILE FIGHTING THAT FIRE, A RISK HE WAS EMPLOYED TO CONFRONT. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MICHELE GOODEN VS. DAN MOTTAZ VIDEO PRODUCTIONS, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 3, 2010, line 6, DEFENDANT DAN MOTTAZ VIDEO PRODUCTIONS, LLC Motion To Compel Arbitration. DENIED. THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT LACKS MUTUALITY AND IS SUBSTANTIVELY UNCONSCIONABLE. ARBITRATION IS MANDATED FOR DISCRIMINATION, COMPENSATION, AND PHYSICAL INJURY CLAIMS THAT ARE COMMONLY BROUGHT BY EMPLOYEES. THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT AND EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT PROVIDES FOR IN-COURT ADJUDICATION OF CLAIMS THAT ARE MOST COMMONLY BROUGHT BY THE EMPLOYER-CONFIDENTIALITY, TRADE SECRETS, ETC. THE "COST SHARING" PROVISION IS ALSO UNCONSCIONABLE. UNCONSCIONABILITY PREMEATES THE AGREEMENTS AND THE CLAUSES WILL NOT BE SEVERED. SEE ARMENDARIZ V. FOUNDATION HEALTH (2000) 24 CAL.4TH 83. REQUEST TO PRESENT ORAL TESTIMONY DENIED. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: FREDDIE OAKS VS. WALDEN HOUSE INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 3, 2010, line 7, PLAINTIFF FREDDIE OAKS DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 7, 10, 14, 15, 17, 20 AND 21. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 6, 8, 9, 12, 13, 16, 18 AND 19 FOR DEFENDANT TO PLEAD FACTS IN SUPPORT. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 11 WHICH DOES NOT APPEAR TO APPLY TO THIS CASE, AND 22 WHICH IS NOT PROPER. =(302/CWW)
